title: asphodelus albus f. delphinensis
intro: Asphodelus albus f. delphinensis, also known as the white asphodel, is a variant of the white asphodel plant (Asphodelus albus), belonging to the lily family (Asphodelaceae). The plant's medicinal properties lie in its roots, which contain inulin, a polysaccharide with anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Asphodelus albus f. delphinensis include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support immune function. Traditionally, the plant's roots are used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate various health issues.
